body: This PR moves the held suarez and Rayleigh sponge tendencies into ClimaAtmos src/, and removes some closures over global variables.
title: Move HS and rayleigh sponge into src

body: This PR fixes the check-bounds job so that it doesn't break due to a missing surface scheme, and by fixing the job ID so that it's unique.
title: Fix perf target check bounds

body:
This PR:
 - Adds soft-fail to the `Use test env with latest deps` job, because this doesn't seem practical to enforce that it always passes when breaking changes occur. The latest ClimaCore has several breaking changes, see [this build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-ci/builds/4692) cc @simonbyrne 
 - Removes soft-fail from the `--check-bounds=yes` job because this is now passing 🎉
title: Adjust soft-fail jobs

body: This PR moves `vertical_diffusion_boundary_layer_tendency!` into src and removes some closures over global variables
title: Move `vertical_diffusion_boundary_layer_tendency!` to src/
